story-context.title: Keycloak OIDC Discovery and JWKS Integration
story-context.summary: Configure automatic Keycloak public key discovery via JWKS endpoint with 10-minute caching for JWT signature validation.
story-context.key-code: - KeycloakOidcConfiguration.kt: OIDC discovery setup - JWK Set URI: http://keycloak:8080/realms/eaf/protocol/openid-connect/certs - Public key caching (refresh every 10 minutes) - Configuration: eaf.security.jwt.jwks-cache-duration=10m
story-context.testing: Integration test validates signature verification with Keycloak-signed JWT, Testcontainers Keycloak 26.4.2
